queries.question: For each streaming service, give me the advertisement durations.
queries.sql: select streaming_service.name , advertisement.duration from Streaming_Service_Advertisement join Advertisement on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.advertisement_id = Advertisement.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?duration WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_advertisement a :Streaming_Service_Advertisement .
  ?advertisement a :Advertisement .
  ?streaming_service_advertisement p:hasAdvertisement ?advertisement .
  ?streaming_service a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_advertisement p:hasStreaming_Service ?streaming_service .
  ?streaming_service p:name ?name .
  ?advertisement p:duration ?duration .
}

queries.question: Which advertisement types and durations do all streaming services have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Advertisement.type, Advertisement.duration  from Streaming_Service_Advertisement join Advertisement on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.advertisement_id = Advertisement.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Advertisement.advertisement_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Advertisement.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

queries.question: Give me the advertisement duration we have on every streaming service.
queries.sql: SELECT Advertisement.duration  from Streaming_Service_Advertisement join Advertisement on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.advertisement_id = Advertisement.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Advertisement.advertisement_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Advertisement.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

queries.question: Give me the advertisement types and durations that each streaming service has.
queries.sql: select streaming_service.name , advertisement.type , advertisement.duration from Streaming_Service_Advertisement join Advertisement on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.advertisement_id = Advertisement.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type ?duration WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_advertisement a :Streaming_Service_Advertisement .
  ?advertisement a :Advertisement .
  ?streaming_service_advertisement p:hasAdvertisement ?advertisement .
  ?streaming_service a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_advertisement p:hasStreaming_Service ?streaming_service .
  ?streaming_service p:name ?name .
  ?advertisement p:type ?type .
  ?advertisement p:duration ?duration .
}

queries.question: Provide me with the advertisement type that is common for all streaming services.
queries.sql: SELECT Advertisement.type  from Streaming_Service_Advertisement join Advertisement on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.advertisement_id = Advertisement.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Advertisement.advertisement_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Advertisement.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

queries.question: Which advertisement types are associated with each streaming service?
queries.sql: select streaming_service.name , advertisement.type from Streaming_Service_Advertisement join Advertisement on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.advertisement_id = Advertisement.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Advertisement.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_advertisement a :Streaming_Service_Advertisement .
  ?advertisement a :Advertisement .
  ?streaming_service_advertisement p:hasAdvertisement ?advertisement .
  ?streaming_service a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_advertisement p:hasStreaming_Service ?streaming_service .
  ?streaming_service p:name ?name .
  ?advertisement p:type ?type .
}
